Cut birch trees
Main Skill: Woodcutting
Max Efficiency: 160%

You swing your axe with all your might, determined to bring down the towering birch trees.

The Cut birch trees activity is a Woodcutting activity.

Locations

This activity can be done at the following locations:

  • Disenchanted Forest in Jarvonia
  • Nomad Woods in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Woodcutting lvl. 1.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Hatchet equipped.

Experience Information

Skill Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Woodcutting 10 35 0.286 0.286 22 0.455 0.455

Drop Tables

Main Drops

Item Name Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Birch logs 1 100.000% ~1 in 1 35 steps 22 steps 0 (0)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Rusty chest Container 1 0.500% ~1 in 200 7,000 steps 4,400 steps
Bird nest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 8,750 steps 5,500 steps
Woodcutting chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 8,750 steps 5,500 steps
Birch skis Loot 1 0.500% ~1 in 200 7,000 steps 4,400 steps
